title: The far right's gains across the 2019 European Parliament election
framed_question: What was the overall impact of the rise of far-right and nationalist parties in the 2019 European Parliament election according to the article?
answer: The overall impact of the rise of far-right and nationalist parties in the 2019 European Parliament election was mixed, as these parties remained fragmented and limited in practical influence despite some individual victories, while centrist parties were able to grow their vote share by positioning themselves as a challenge to far-right gains.

title: Dutch parties react to European Parliament election results
framed_question: What was the outcome of the European Parliament election in the Netherlands regarding the Labour party's performance?
answer: The Labour party (PvdA) won the most seats among Dutch parties in the European Parliament election, becoming the largest Dutch party for the first time since 1984. PvdA leader Lodewijk Asscher described the result as very spectacular.
